entries.title: Python Basics
entries.content: High-level language known for readability. Uses indentation for blocks. Great for data science, automation, and web backends (FastAPI, Django).

entries.title: JavaScript Essentials
entries.content: Runs in browsers and on servers (Node.js). Core for interactive web apps. Use const/let, async/await for modern async code.

entries.title: Recursion
entries.content: A function that calls itself with a smaller subproblem. Always define a base case to stop. Used in trees, divide-and-conquer, and dynamic programming.

entries.title: Object-Oriented Programming
entries.content: Organize code into classes (blueprints) and objects (instances). Encapsulation, inheritance, and polymorphism reduce complexity.

entries.title: Debugging Strategy
entries.content: Reproduce the bug, read the error message, isolate with print/logs or a debugger, fix one issue at a time, then add a test to prevent regression.
